headline: How The Cardinal Health (CAH) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Fair Value
summary: Cardinal Health’s fair value estimate was nudged from US$249.60 to about US$248.27 per share, signalling a small recalibration rather than a wholesale rethink. That shift sits alongside a cluster of Street price target moves, with several firms lifting targets into the mid to high US$200s and one house cutting its view by about US$20 as analysts reassess what is already reflected in the share price. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives can help you track...
